folio.label: 113r
folio.l: While that he songö , so chauntetú he and craketú
And god wot , what that May , thougút in hire hert
Whan she hi~ saw , vpsittyngö in his shert
In his nygút cappe , and witú his nekke lene
She preysetú nat , his pleiyngö wortú a bene
Than seide he thus , my reste wol I take
Now day is come , I may no lengere wake
And doun he leid his hede , and slep~ til péme
And afterward , whan that he saw his tyme
Vp risetú Ianuarie , but fresshe May
Held hire chaumbre , vn to the ferthe day
As vsage is , of wyues , for the beste
For euäy labour sumtyme , mote haue reste
Or ellis in in longe may he , nat endure
This is to seyn , no lyues creature
Be it of fyssú or bryd , or beest or man
Now wol I speke , of wooful Damyan
That langwysshetú for loue , as ©e shuln heere
Therfore I speke to hi~ , in this manere
I seide , o seely Damyan , allas
Answere to myn demaunde , as in this cas
How shalt æè , to thy lady fressú may
Telle thy woo , she wyl alwey sey nay
Eke if æè speke , she wyl thy woo be wrey
God be thyn helpe , I can no betyr sey
This syke Damyan , in venus fyre
So brennetú , that he deyetú for desyre
For whicú he put his lyf , in auenture
No lengere mygút he , in this wyse endure
But preuyly a pennere , gan he borwe
And in a &lbar;re wrot he , al his sorwe
In manere of a compleynt , or a lay
Vn to this fair , fressú May
And in a purs of sylk , hengö oon his sherte
He hatú it put , and leide it at his herte
The Mone that at noon , was that ilke day
That Ianuarie hatú wedded , fressú May
In two of Taurö , was in to Cancre glyden
So longe hatú Mayus , in hire chaumbre a beden~
As custume is , vn to theise nobles alle
A bryde shal nat , eten in the halle
Til dayes foure , or thre dayes at the lest
Passed ben , than late hire go to feest
The ferthe day complet , fro noon to noonö
Whan that the heye masse , was I dou~
In halle syt this Ianuarie , and May
